context.description: Implement Celery worker infrastructure replacing FastAPI BackgroundTasks for PDF processing. Create celery_app.py, pdf_worker.py Celery task, and migrate existing processing endpoints to use Celery for crash-recovery and job status persistence.
acceptance_criteria: backend/workers/celery_app.py configures Celery with broker=CELERY_BROKER_URL, backend=CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND, task_serializer='json', result_expires=3600

backend/workers/pdf_worker.py defines @celery_app.task(bind=True, max_retries=3) process_pdf_task(self, job_id, user_id, file_path) that: calls enhanced_gemini_processor, saves via database_optimizer, updates job status in Supabase
processing.py /process-pdf endpoint dispatches to pdf_worker.process_pdf_task.delay() and returns {job_id, status: 'queued'} immediately
Existing /upload endpoint continues to work during migration (backward compatible)
Job status polling endpoint returns {job_id, status: queued|processing|completed|failed, tradelines_count} from Supabase jobs table
Celery worker starts successfully with: celery -A backend.workers.celery_app worker --loglevel=info

PDF processing under 45s for <5MB, 90s for 5-10MB (EP-009 SLA tiers — supersedes PRD F1 original <30s target; celery_app.py uses Redis DB1 for broker, DB2 for results to avoid collision with cache_service DB0)
Regression check: run existing pytest backend/tests/ after Celery migration — negative tradeline detection accuracy must remain >=95% (no regression from BackgroundTasks migration)
implementation_approach: Step 1: Read backend/services/background_jobs.py and backend/services/job_service.py for existing job patterns
Step 2: Read backend/api/v1/routes/processing.py to understand current upload flow
Step 4: Create backend/workers/celery_app.py with Celery instance configuration
Step 5: Create backend/workers/pdf_worker.py with process_pdf_task - delegate to existing enhanced_gemini_processor
Step 6: Modify processing.py to call pdf_worker.process_pdf_task.delay() instead of BackgroundTasks
Step 7: Ensure job_service.py updates Supabase job status on task completion/failure
Step 8: Do NOT modify tradeline_extraction.py in this task (keep existing endpoint working)
pre_analysis: Read backend/services/background_jobs.py - understand existing BackgroundTasks usage
Read backend/services/job_service.py - understand job status storage pattern
Read backend/api/v1/routes/processing.py - map existing upload flow
Read backend/services/enhanced_gemini_processor.py - identify main extraction function signature
